title: crocodeilanthe choerorhyncha
intro: Crocodeilanthe choerorhyncha, also known as "tiger flower," is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crocodeilanthe choerorhyncha include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications for medicinal purposes.
